items.titolo: Nuovi prodotti Apple in arrivo sotto la guida di John Ternus

items.titolo: Snow: nuovi malware distribuiti tramite Microsoft Teams
items.descrizione: Gli esperti di Mandiant hanno rilevato la nuova suite di malware SNOW che sfrutta Microsoft Teams e un'estensione per accedere alle reti e rubare dati. The post Snow: nuovi malware distribuiti tramite Microsoft Teams app

items.titolo: Taiwan's stock market surpasses the UK's despite having less than a quarter of the UK's economy — AI boom propels Taiwan forward, TSMC alone accounts for more than 40% of Taiwan's total market value
items.descrizione: Taiwan's stock market is now worth more than the United Kingdom's, in a shift driven almost entirely by the insatiable global appetite for AI chips.

items.titolo: Enthusiast builds 3D-printed retro PC case and shares the files so you can print it yourself — design fits ITX mobo and ATX PSU, comes with front 3.5-inch bay for USB ports

items.titolo: California Engineer Identified in Suspected Shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner
items.descrizione: The 31-year-old engineer and self-described indie game developer is suspected of firing shots at the annual event attended by President Donald Trump, high-profile media figures, and US government officials.
